title: Section 64B
content: 1[2[64B. [Entry of names of members in the register.]---Omitted by s. 70, ibid. (w.e.f. 26-12-2014).]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 47 of 1950, s. 45 (w.e.f. 1-6-1950). 2. Subs. by Act 5 of 2015, s. 69, for "Insurance Association of India, Councils of The Association and Committees Thereof" (w.e.f. 26-12-2014).
